nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Aragon was born in 1019, in Aragón, Spain, her father, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, was 13 and her mother, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, was 5. She had at least 5 sons with Sir Richard Seignuer De Perrot. She died in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in North Perrot, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Aragon est née en 1019, à Aragón, Espagne, son père, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, avait 5 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec Sir Richard Seignuer De Perrot. Elle est décédée à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à North Perrot, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatte mit Sir Richard Seignuer De Perrot mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb in Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in North Perrot, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Aragonが1019年にスペインアラグoンで生まれた時，父Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragónは13歳，母Geberge Ermesinda de Foixは5歳であった。彼女はSir Richard Seignuer De Perrotとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスソメルセトで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトノース ペロトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Aragon(이)가 1019년 스페인 아라그o에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geberge Ermesinda de Foix(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Seignuer De Perrot(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 페로트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Aragon родилась в 1019 г. в местности арагoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, 5. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Sir Richard Seignuer De Perrot. Она умерла в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности норт пиррот, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
